docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LAM, CHUCK AS TO DEFENDANT JEAN CURUTCHET INC. CURUTCHET, MICHAEL DOES 1 TO 25 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR NOV-14-2003 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  SEP-15-2003 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         OCT-30-2003
ADDED TO PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR HEARING SET FOR OCT-14-2003 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 212
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE FILLED BY THE PLANTIFF
BEFORE HEARING, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS ORDERED OFF CALENDAR BY COURT. (212)
PRE-TRIAL CALENDAR SWEEP, CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF NOV-14-2003, OFF CALENDAR, DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION FILED (SWEEP)
